bead.title: artifact-types: FEAT-018 + FEAT-005 spec amendments
bead.description: FEAT-018 (plugin API stability) registers the artifact-type discovery contract: plugins ship per-type definitions at <plugin>/workflows/**/artifacts/<typeId>/{meta.yml,template.md,prompt.md,example.md}. Plugins lacking workflows/ tree opt in via package.yaml.artifact_type_roots. FEAT-005 amendment: prefix lookup is plugin-defined; conventional types remain valid fallback.
bead.acceptance: 1. FEAT-018 documents the discovery contract + frontmatter shape. 2. FEAT-005 amended to reference plugin-declared types. 3. ddx doc audit clean. 4. New shape mandated; legacy HELIX shape supported as compat.
